NewStrings.LOC_SC_OscuroObeliskScript_Aftercountle_: After countless hours of hazardous work, after months of sleep deprivation, Oscuro finally completed the release of version 1.3. His spirit now enjoys a well-deserved R & R in the plane of Earth while it replenishes its strength to tackle future challenges. The foolish conjurer Urikslarga (devakm) tried numerous times to summon Oscuro's spirit back into Tamriel, despite many setbacks and unreal remastering gremlins.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Equippingage_01: Equipping a gem or mineral (i.e., Gold Nugget) allows you to grind it into dust, which can be used for Alchemy. 'Confirmation Options' allow you to set or skip a menu pop-up, to confirm you want to grind. 'Gain Skill Options' allow you to gain Alchemy skill whenever you successfully grind.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Equippingage_02: Equipping a gem or mineral (i.e., Gold Nugget) allows you to grind it into dust, which can be used for Alchemy. 'Confirmation Options' allow you to set or skip a menu pop-up, to confirm you want to grind. 'Gain Skill Options' allow you to gain Alchemy skill whenever you successfully grind (requires OBSE).
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Whenyouequip_03: When you equip a gem a confirmation menu will pop up, in case you accidentally clicked the gem. If you choose to 'Skip Confirmation', you can either grind 1 gem per click or All.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Whenyouequip_04: When you equip a gem a confirmation menu will pop up, in case you accidentally clicked the gem. If you choose to 'Skip Confirmation', you can either grind 1 gem per click or All.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Whenyouequip_05: When you equip a gem a confirmation menu will pop up, in case you accidentally clicked the gem. If you choose to 'Skip Confirmation', you can either grind 1 gem per click or All.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Youcanchoose_06: You can choose to gain Alchemy skill whenever you successfully grind a gem. Each ground gem will be like eating [ %.2f ] ingredients.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Youcanchoose_07: You can choose to gain Alchemy skill whenever you successfully grind a gem. The skill gain will be the same as eating an ingredient (Wortcraft). It can also be set as a multiplier of the Wortcraft gain - 1/10x (10 grinds = 1 eaten ingredient), 1/4x, 1/2x, 3/4x, 1x, 2x, 3x, etc.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Equippingage_08: Equipping a gem or mineral (i.e., Gold Nugget) allows you to grind it into dust, which can be used for Alchemy. 'Confirmation Options' allow you to set or skip a menu pop-up, to confirm you want to grind. 'Gain Skill Options' allow you to gain Alchemy skill whenever you successfully grind.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGrindQS_Equippingage_09: Equipping a gem or mineral (i.e., Gold Nugget) allows you to grind it into dust, which can be used for Alchemy. 'Confirmation Options' allow you to set or skip a menu pop-up, to confirm you want to grind. 'Gain Skill Options' allow you to gain Alchemy skill whenever you successfully grind (requires OBSE).

It can also be set as a multiplier of the Wortcraft gain - 1/10x (10 grinds = 1 eaten ingredient), 1/4x, 1/2x, 3/4x, 1x, 2x, 3x, etc.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GrindTriggerS_Ineedamortar_01: I need a mortar and pestle to grind this.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GrindMenuS_Howmanyofthi_01: How many of this item do I want to grind? (I have %g.)

NewStrings.LOC_SC_GrindS_Igroundthemi_01: I ground them into %g dust with practiced ease.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GrindS_Igrounditint_02: I ground it into %g dust with practiced ease.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GrindS_Ifumbledwith_03: I fumbled with the mortar and pestle for a while, but ended up wasting it.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSylvanArmorQS_Acacophonyof_01: A cacophony of laughter and whispers fills my mind. The silvery voices mock my attempt to don this item. I distinguish a name, the Storyteller. Somehow, I am yet unworthy of their lord's blessing. The whispers become louder. I can sense their growing anger. Suddenly, they stop. A flash of iridescent green light blinds my sight. I can see the damp blue hues of an Ayleid ruin's hall. Upon a pedestal rests a magnificent green jewel. A single sound echoes in my mind... Narind.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSylvanArmorQS_Thewhispersb_02: The whispers become louder, incessantly repeating sounds I do not understand. I can sense the urgency in their tone, its growing anger. Suddenly, the voices fall silent. A flash of iridescent green light blinds my sight...
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSylvanArmorQS_Islowlyregai_03: ... I slowly regain my vision, which reveals the damp blue hues of an Ayleid ruin's hall. In its center, upon a pedestal rests a magnificent green jewel. A single sound echoes in my mind... Narind...
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSylvanArmorQS_Icannotweart_04: I cannot wear this sacred armor until I have proven my allegiance to the Storyteller's cause in the depths of Narind.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSylvanArmorQS_Acacophonyof_05: A cacophony of laughter and whispers fills my mind. The silvery voices mock my attempt to don this item. I distinguish a name, the Storyteller. Somehow, I am yet unworthy of their lord's blessing. The whispers become louder. I can sense their growing anger. Suddenly, they stop. A flash of iridescent green light blinds my sight. I can see the damp blue hues of an Ayleid ruin's hall. Upon a pedestal rests a magnificent green jewel. A single sound echoes in my mind... Narind.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSylvanArmorQS_Thewhispersb_06: The whispers become louder, incessantly repeating sounds I do not understand. I can sense the urgency in their tone, its growing anger. Suddenly, the voices fall silent. A flash of iridescent green light blinds my sight...
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSylvanArmorQS_Islowlyregai_07: ... I slowly regain my vision, which reveals the damp blue hues of an Ayleid ruin's hall. In its center, upon a pedestal rests a magnificent green jewel. A single sound echoes in my mind... Narind...
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSylvanArmorQS_Icannotweart_08: I cannot wear this sacred armor until I have proven my allegiance to the Storyteller's cause in the depths of Narind.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnVampireSoulAbsorb_Asma: A small vibration shakes my arm. Light of Dawn reacts to the death of the vampire. It almost seems to enjoy the kill.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnVampireSoulAbsorb_Asur: A surge of energy jolts through me. My hands shake violently as I try to keep my grasp on Light of Dawn. The sword, its blade drenched in vampire blood, absorbs the vile creature's life. I can sense that the sword's power has awakened slightly.

A surge of energy jolts through me. My hands shake violently as I try to keep my grasp on Light of Dawn. The sword, its blade drenched in vampire blood, absorbs the vile creature's life. I can sense that the sword's power has awakened moderately.

A surge of pure energy jolts through me. My hands shake violently as I try to keep my grasp on Light of Dawn. The sword, its blade drenched in vampire blood, absorbs the vile creature's life. I can sense that the sword's power has awakened to its full potential.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowth_Theswordre: The sword responds to my grasp. I feel a strange sensation, as if the sword was relieved to be taken from the altar. But as soon as the emotion is gone, a terrible anger and thirst for vengeance radiates from its blade.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowth_UseOBSE13o: Use OBSE 13 or higher and set OOOLightOfDawnUseFlame to 1 for flame effect swapping. Current OBSE Version: %.2f
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowth_Theswordbu: The sword burns your hands. It will not tolerate being held by a vampire.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowthA_UseOBSE13: Use OBSE 13 or higher and set OOOLightOfDawnUseFlame to 1 for flame effect swapping. Current OBSE Version: %.2f
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowthA_Arushofen: A rush of energy surges through me. My hands shake violently as I try to keep my grasp on Light of Dawn. The sword, its blade drenched in vampire blood, absorbs the vile creature's life. I can sense that the sword's power has awakened slightly.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowthA_Theswordb: The sword burns your hands badly. It will not tolerate being held by a vampire.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowthB_UseOBSE13: Use OBSE 13 or higher and set OOOLightOfDawnUseFlame to 1 for flame effect swapping. Current OBSE Version: %.2f
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowthB_Anothersu: Another surge of energy rushes through me. Once again, my hands shake violently as I try to keep my grip on Light of Dawn. Drenched in vampire blood, the sword absorbs the vile creature's life. I can sense that the sword's power has awakened even more.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowthB_Theswordb: The sword burns your hands badly. It will not tolerate being held by a vampire.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_7HeavenFuryCuirassPropScript_This: This magnificent cuirass will not budge. It is somehow bound to its resting place by some form of magic that escapes my understanding. Perhaps there is a way to unravel its enchantments, but I suspect that the answer lies elsewhere.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_7HeavenFuryCuirassPropScript_Anin: An intense warmth runs through my arm upon touching the cuirass. The mystical force that binds it slowly fades away.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnPowerGrowthC_Anincredi: An incredible surge of pure energy jolts through me. My hands shake violently as I try to keep my grasp on Light of Dawn. Its blade drenched in vampire blood, the sword absorbs another vile creature's life. I feel certain that the sword's power has finally awakened to its full potential.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_DreadArmorGoodRangerQuestScript_I: I feel as if I had stepped into a void, yet my body still hangs in the air without falling. It is like being present and at the same time completely distant from the surrounding material reality. I see a vision - a blade, a great evil, a great destiny. A single sound echoes in my mind... Varastal.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GhostArmorWeaponScriptSummoned_My: My hand freezes upon touching the fallen spectral warrior.
My hand passes through the spectral warrior with some difficulty, as if I could almost hold it--yet, I cannot.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_6DremoraDaedricLavaHelmetPlayable: After an epic battle, the terrible Dremora falls dead to the ground. Its power was awe-inspiring. Judging from its magnificent armor and weapon, it belonged to the leading ranks of Dremora castes.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_9BossBuffScriptHlofor_Afteraninte: After an intense fight, the mighty warrior falls dead to the ground. I am surprised of his power and stamina. He was old but moved like a man in his prime. Undoubtedly, there is something special about him.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GhostArmorWeaponScript_Myhandfree: My hand freezes upon touching the fallen spectral warrior.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GhostArmorWeaponScript_Myhandpass: My hand passes through the spectral warrior with some difficulty, as if I could almost hold it--yet, I cannot.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GhostWeaponBattleAxe_Myhandfreeze: My hand freezes as it touches the ethereal battle axe.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_ZVampireLordVolmyrWeaponVanish_Yo: Your hand goes through this ethereal enemy as if it were not before your eyes. A cold shiver runs up your spine.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_9BossBuffScriptGhuul_Yourhandfree: Your hand freezes upon touching the fallen spectral warrior.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_9BossBuffScriptGhuul_Afteranterri: After an terrible fight, the mysterious spectre finds its final death. It was the most difficult foe from the netherworld that I have had to face, yet. Part of its great power came from its radiant sword. I cannot help but to stare at it in wonder. Truly, a weapon from another world.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOODreadSwordDoorScript_MyDreadAr: My Dread Armor begins to hum as I touch this sealed door. The spectral powers of the armor resonate with the enchantments placed upon this door. Slowly, it begins to open, allowing me passage.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOODreadSwordDoorScript_Myhandjol: My hand jolts as I toch this sealed door. Somehow, it reminds me to the sensation of deep freezing that coursed my body whenever I touched spectral beings. Perhaps it will react if the entire Dread Armor set is worn before it.

My hand jolts as I toch this sealed door. Somehow, it reminds me to the sensation of deep freezing that coursed my body whenever I touched spectral beings. Perhaps it will react if the entire Dread Armor set is worn before it.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOODreadSwordDoorScript_Thisdoori: This door is sealed and will not budge. Perhaps there is a quick way to unlock it, but I suspect that the answer lies somewhere else.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OldAmazonArmorWhiteRose_Thismagni: This magnificent armor suits only females.
This magnificent armor suits only females.
This magnificent armor suits only females.
This magnificent armor suits only females.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GhostArmorScript_Myhandfreeze_01: My hand freezes as it touches the ethereal armor.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GhostArmorScript_Myhandpasses_02: My hand passes through the spectral armor with some difficulty, as if I could almost grasp it--yet, I cannot.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSE32GhostWeaponScript_Theghost: The ghostly weapon disappears when your hand touches it.

My hand passes through the spectral wolf with some difficulty, as if I could almost hold it--yet, I cannot.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_9AlmalexiaLoveKey_Carefullywra_01: Carefully wrapped in purple silk, a key of iridescent metal lied inside this letter.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AureusJephreJewelWolf_AsIstepinto: As I step into the open, the magnificent jewel that I recovered from the depths of Narind begins to glow with an iridescent green light. Suddenly, a humming noise grows in intensity. The jewel, as if it were alive, rattles inside my pack with tremendous force. Before I can reach for it, the Heart of the Wild Woods bursts out. Upon touching the ground it transforms into ether--a giant wolf materializes before me. The ghostly form, without hesitation, runs into the folliage and disappears.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_9BossBuffScriptBlackRockCaptain_T: The spectral pirate finally returns to the netherworld. Its power was great, probably as his might was when life still coursed through his body.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OldAmazonArmorDarkRose_Thismagnif: This magnificent armor suits only females.
This magnificent armor suits only females.
This magnificent armor suits only females.
This magnificent armor suits only females.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_9BossBuffScriptVolmyr_TheancientM: The ancient Master of Vampires, Lord Volmyr, falls to the ground, at last, defeated by the power of my heroic attacks. Bright light emanates from his body, releasing energy all around his dead carcass. The legendary demon now lies dead, no longer cursed to roam the world in un-life. He lost his imortality and I gained mine. This deed will be recognized for centuries to come.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSlaverGuarPropMountScript_This: This Guar belongs to the slavers of this camp. If I steal it and they find out then I can expect some hostility.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_DAHircineStatueScriptTest_Gomycha: Go, my champion. May you be the last head on the Huntsman's wall.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_DAHircineStatueScriptTest_Hircine: Hircine demands a more powerful champion to begin this quest.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_DAHircineStatueScriptTest_Youdono: You do not have the item requested by Hircine.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_AureusJephreJewelProp_Ifeelwarmth: I feel warmth emanating from the magnificent jewel. Upon touching its surface, an immense sensation of joy overwhelms me. Visions of pristine forests, crystalline waters and mountains of majestic beauty fill my thoughts. Out of the corner of my eye I notice bushes rustling beside me. I turn, only to find a giant wolf looking at me. It smiles... The visions vanish and I am back deep inside the bowels of Narind. Still, something feels different--life pulses through me like never before.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LapDrunkScript_GreatworkIhu_01: Great work! I hurt all over. That stuff just does not sit well with me.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LapDrunkScript_WhatWhenWher_02: What? When? Where am I? I had a little too much of that grog.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LapDrunkScript_WhattheThisd_03: What the...? This does not happen often to me any more--fun!
NewStrings.LOC_SC_9BossBuffScriptCarlaDuVrey_CarlaD: Carla Du Vrey's body lies now as still as the graves of her lair. Her death will be felt throughout the Putrid Hand's ranks. I have robbed them of one of their most treasured leaders.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GeomancyEnable_Youstudythis_01: You study this document with interest. It looks as though the technique is simple...
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GeomancyEnable_Youstudythis_02: You study this document with interest. It looks as though the technique is simple...
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OscuroTombstoneBetaAdvisorsScript: The OOO 1.3 Beta-Advisors Were:  5hakes, Addikt, Baksheesh, Bo Straightarrow, BradRinWI, creepyfellow, dev_akm, doofdilla, ElementalNimbus, Elhoim, iron golem, Josef K., Kal Choedan, Lyrondor, Madcat, Natalia, OmegaRED, osprey15, Praetorio, Soor, ubik
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OscuroTombstoneSpecialThanksScrip: Special Thanks to Ana, Kai, Mara, Gork, Hav, Paps, George y el Coballa. Also, many thanks to Bethesda for another great game in the TES series. Finally, this work is dedicated to,,, you.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOO8InebriationSpellEffectDummyAl: Fine Ale! I love this thing.
That's what I am talking about!
That hit the spot, no doubt.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOO8InebriationSpellEffectDummyBe: That beer hit the spot, oh yeah.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOO8InebriationSpellEffectDummyCi: That's what I am talking about!
Wonderful brandy! I feel all warm already.
That's what I am talking about!
Yeah, that's my kind of brandy!
What a potent brew, this one.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOO8InebriationSpellEffectDummyCy: That went down quick and burning!
That's the spirit, Cyrodiil brews all the way.
Going to get sloppy with this stuff!
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOO8InebriationSpellEffectDummyMe: That's what I am talking about!
That mead is not for the faint of heart.
Great mead. Tastes and smells sweet all over.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOO8InebriationSpellEffectDummyNe: This stuff is some powerful grog!
That's how I like my beer!
Strong and tasty--gotta be careful with it!
That hit the spot, and then some.
What did they put in this? Its like fire from Oblivion.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOO8InebriationSpellEffectDummyWi: Not bad, this soup! I feel warm already.
That's what I am talking about!
A bit stingy but I'll take it any day!
Not too bad.
I've tasted better but it'll do.
Not too shabby, after all.
Yep, cheap wine's the ticket to paradise.
Fine home-made goody! I feel invigorated.
That's a bit rough on the palate!
Refreshing although a little too acidic.
That's not bad for a home-made grog!
Good stuff!
This is going to give me a good headache later.
Flavor is great on this one.
Subtle and well-crafted wine!
Now, that's my kind of grape-brew!
Refreshing and tasty!
That hit the spot, no doubt.
Good aroma and taste!
Hey! This grog ain't bad.
Great wine this one.
Sweet wine! It feels great.
That's not bad. Surilie brand, uh?
Refreshing, colorful, tasty. Good Wine!
That hit the spot, I love this wine.
Good work on this one, Surilie brothers.
Hey! This grog ain't bad.
Hello bottle of Surilie brothers' brew--and goodbye!
Sweet and aromatic wine! It feels great.
That's very good wine. Surilie brand, uh?
Refreshing, colorful, tasty. Excellent Wine!
That hit the spot, I love this brand.
Good work on this one, Surilie Brothers.
Hey! This vintage is wonderful.
Hello bottle of Surilie Brothers' brew--and goodbye!
My! This is some serious wine!
That's just amazing. Surilie Brothers all the way!
Refreshing, colorful, tasty. Perfect Wine!
That felt like ambrosia, I love this vintage.
Near perfect work, Surilie Brothers.
Wow! This wine is smooth as silk.
Hello fine bottle of Surilie Brothers' brew--and goodbye!
Good wine! It warms my heart.
Yep, that's what I am talking about!
Chilled and tasty West Weald Wine!
That hit the spot, no doubt.
Good wine, Tamika!
Hey! This grog ain't bad.
Fine wine indeed. Tamika knows her stuff.
Excellent wine! It warms my heart.
Yep, that's what I am talking about!
Chilled, aromatic and tasty 415 Vintage!
That's one great wine, no doubt.
Excellent wine. Tamika does not let down!
Hey! This grog is quite good!.
Excellent wine indeed. Tamika knows her stuff.
What an amazing vintage! This is a luxury.
That's my kind of wine, Tamika!
Refreshing, aromatic, subtle, colorful, what else could I want!
That hit the spot, and the other, and the next!
Near perfect grape-brew. Tamikas' are amazing!
Hey! This vintage 399 tastes like success.
Perfect wine indeed. Tamika knows her stuff.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnSpellEffectScriptC_Lig: Light of Dawn has slain %.0f vampires.
Light of Dawn has slain %.0f vampires.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_LightOfDawnSpellEffectScriptC_Usi: Using the energy of the slain vampire, Light of Dawn cures you of Porphyric Hemophilia.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_zOOODragonborneScript_Thegoblinsh: The goblin shaman of this lair is dead.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_bgOOOArcaneTheftScript_Youcannots: You cannot steal from someone knowing you're there!
NewStrings.LOC_SC_bgOOOArcaneTheftScript_Youcantste: You can't steal from this target!
NewStrings.LOC_SC_bgOOOChangeSlowWeather_Whatweathe: What weather do you desire? To get back normal weather pattern use Release Weather!
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GhostWeaponIxcthSwordv2H_Myhandfr: My hand freezes as it touches the strange ethereal sword.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_GhostWeaponIxcthSwordv2L_Myhandfr: My hand freezes as it touches the strange ethereal sword.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnSpellEffectScript_A: A small vibration shakes my arm. Light of Dawn reacts to the death of the vampire. It almost seems to enjoy the kill.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnSpellEffectScript_L: Light of Dawn has slain %.0f vampires.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnSpellEffectScript_Y: You feel a strong rush of energy as this vampire dies. Light of Dawn has slain %.0f vampires.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnSpellEffectScript_L: Light of Dawn has slain %.0f vampires.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnSpellEffectScript_Y: You feel a brief rush of energy as this vampire dies. Light of Dawn has slain %.0f vampires.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnSpellEffectScript_U: Using the energy of the slain vampire, Light of Dawn attempts to cure you of Porphyric Hemophilia, but it does not yet have the strength to do so.
Using the energy of the slain vampire, Light of Dawn cures you of Porphyric Hemophilia.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnWeaponQuestScr_Arus: A rush of energy surges through me. My hands shake violently as I try to keep my grasp on Light of Dawn. The sword, its blade drenched in vampire blood, absorbs the vile creature's life. I can sense that the sword's power has awakened slightly.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnWeaponQuestScr_Anot: Another surge of energy rushes through me. Once again, my hands shake violently as I try to keep my grip on Light of Dawn. Drenched in vampire blood, the sword absorbs the vile creature's life. I can sense that the sword's power has awakened even more.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnWeaponQuestScr_Anin: An incredible surge of pure energy jolts through me. My hands shake violently as I try to keep my grasp on Light of Dawn. Its blade drenched in vampire blood, the sword absorbs another vile creature's life. I feel certain that the sword's power has finally awakened to its full potential.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnWeaponQuestScr_Thes: The sword burns your hands. It will not tolerate being held by a vampire.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnPowerGrowth_Theswor: The sword responds to my grasp. I feel a strange sensation, as if the sword was relieved to be taken from the altar. But as soon as the emotion is gone, a terrible anger and thirst for vengeance radiates from its blade.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOLightOfDawnPowerGrowth_UseOBSE: Use OBSE 15 or higher and set OOOLightOfDawnUseFlame to 1 for flame effect swapping. Current OBSE Version: %.2f
NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptFishQS_Youcanenable_01: You can enable fishes for the previously rather dead-looking underwater environments of default Oblivion. These fishes will wander around and do their own thing. They can be killed, and they may also follow the player, curious. However, this feature can impact performance. If you experience slow-downs when near water-bodies, this may be the culprit.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptGeomancyQS_Geomancygive_01: Geomancy gives you powerful spells that use gems and minerals (i.e., Gold Nuggets) as components. Each gem gives you a different type of spell, while each quality (i.e., Flawed, Perfect) gives you different strengths of the spell. Spells are added and removed automatically, reflecting your inventory. (Turning Geomancy off will remove all spells.)

NewStrings.LOC_SC_OptContainersQS_SkillRequire_17: 'Skill Requirements' prevent an early Apprentice from picking a Hard lock. 'Allow in Combat' also affects bashing and can be useful if the game engine still believes you are in combat, even though you shook off that dreaded Mud Crab.

NewStrings.LOC_SC_OOOSEMazaddhaCupboardScript_Thisl: This lock cannot be picked. You need a key.
